libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test execution of io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1, configure the generated test build to pass runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` to `nativeTest`. Standard meaningful coverage can use an in-process Vert.x `HttpServer` plus `WebClient` for requests, JSON bodies, forms, multipart upload, redirects, cookies/session, and caching; avoid relying on external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Vert.x Web Client declares optional integrations such as OAuth2; only add those dependencies if tests deliberately exercise those optional APIs.
The current 5.0.0 build.gradle gates the native runtime properties on exactly `5.0.0`, so running the same tests with `GVM_TCK_LV=5.0.1` can miss the required properties.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for normal Vert.x Web Client coverage; the resolved 5.0.1 stack still uses Netty 4.2.x, so native-image runtime tests on JDK 25 need the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already used for 5.0.0.
